pi_items.source: Task description specifies all denominations including bills and coins. Metadata 'denominations' field only includes bills (which are correctly listed), not coins or other items.

Web search confirms NCH Software applications store data in pattern C:\Users\[username]\AppData\Roaming\NCH Software\[AppName]. The exact folder name 'CopperPointOfSale' for this specific application could not be independently verified through available documentation.

pi_items.verified_value: Copper Point of Sale by NCH Software
pi_items.source: Web search results from https://www.nchsoftware.com/point-of-sale/index.html and https://help.nchsoftware.com/help/en/copper/win/help.pdf confirm Copper Point of Sale is a real retail POS software product by NCH Software

privileged_info_summary: Copper Point of Sale is a real retail POS software product by NCH Software. The cash count task requires recording exactly $347.85 in mixed denominations: 10×$20 bills, 5×$10 bills, 8×$5 bills, 12×$1 bills, 3×$1 coins, 85 quarters, 66 dimes, 50 nickels, 250 pennies, and $10 in checks/other. The expected total of $347.85 is mathematically correct. The data values are synthetic/arbitrary task inputs, not real cash count data.
